childIssues.title: PEAA-2.1: Integrate PEAA-2 SQL suite into app migration runner
scope: Integrate PEAA-2 SQL artifacts into target app migration tooling
Enforce migration order in deploy pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: Migrations apply in required order through app migration runner
Developer setup can bootstrap DB with one documented command
No drift between migration runner artifacts and source SQL files

childIssues.title: PEAA-2.2: Add PEAA-2 DB verification gate in CI
scope: Run PEAA-2 SQL suite in ephemeral CI Postgres
Publish verification output as CI artifact
acceptanceCriteria: CI executes PEAA-2 SQL suite on relevant pull requests
CI artifact contains row-count and assertion outputs

childIssues.title: PEAA-2.3: Create DB rollout runbook for staging/prod
scope: Define DB backup + apply checklist for staging and production
Define forward-fix policy for failed migrations
Require staging dry-run prior to production
acceptanceCriteria: Release checklist records backup, apply order, and owner
Staging dry-run is mandatory and logged
Production migration command and owner are explicit per release
